summary: Bug fix verification PASSED for 'Navigation view UI not visible - bottom ETA arrival bar missing and alternate route and fuel cost and HOS status missing'. The fix reverted RouteComparisonPanel wrapper from <div style={scale}> back to <> fragment, which was creating a new containing block that broke absolute positioning. All HUD elements now display correctly in driving mode.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Route Comparison Panel appears after searching destination (data-testid='route-comparison-panel')
VERIFIED: After clicking Close on Route Comparison, driving mode starts with all HUD elements visible
VERIFIED: Arrival HUD bar visible at bottom showing speed (0), distance (661.0 mi), time (9h 38m), ETA (7:49 AM)
VERIFIED: Fuel Cost panel visible on right ($357.98, 101.7 gal)
VERIFIED: HOS Status panel visible on right (11h 0m drive left)
VERIFIED: Navigation HUD at top showing turn instructions ('Head toward S 8th St on W Broadway. Go for 1312 ft.')
VERIFIED: Weather panel visible on left side (47° CLOUDY, 11 MPH ESE wind, 8.3 MI visibility)
VERIFIED: Compass Rose visible in bottom right corner
VERIFIED: Speed limit sign visible on map (35 mph)
VERIFIED: Route Hazards panel showing FOG/LOW VIS warning
VERIFIED: Truck Restrictions panel showing toll booth restriction
VERIFIED: Along Route POIs panel showing nearby truck stops

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for Navigation view HUD elements verified. Root cause was a scale wrapper div around RouteComparisonPanel that created a new containing block, breaking absolute positioning. Fix: Reverted wrapper from <div style={scale}> to <> fragment at line 5873. Also added safety check at lines 4746-4758 to auto-start driving if hudLayout.showRouteComparison is false. Test flow: Guest Login -> Navigation -> Search 'Dallas TX' -> Press Enter -> Wait for route -> Route Comparison appears -> Click 'Close' -> All driving HUD elements appear (arrival bar, fuel, HOS, navigation HUD, weather, compass, speed limit). Key data-testids: route-comparison-panel, route-comparison-close, nav-arrival-hud, trip-info-panel, compass-rose-container.

route_comparison_panel.details: Route Comparison Panel appears with PRIMARY, ALT 1, ALT 2 routes showing time, distance, fuel cost

arrival_hud.details: Bottom arrival bar shows current road (W BROADWAY, GO), speed, distance (661.0 mi), time (9h 38m), ETA (7:49 AM)

fuel_cost_panel.details: Fuel Cost panel on right shows $357.98 for 101.7 gal

hos_status_panel.details: HOS Status panel on right shows 11h 0m drive left

navigation_hud.details: Top navigation HUD shows turn instructions with arrow icon and distance (1312 ft)

weather_panel.details: Weather panel on left shows 47° CLOUDY, wind 11 MPH ESE, visibility 8.3 MI, 3-day forecast

compass_rose.details: Compass Rose visible in bottom right corner

speed_limit_sign.details: Speed limit sign (35 mph) visible on map

truck_restrictions.details: Truck Restrictions panel shows toll booth restriction alert

route_hazards.details: Route Hazards panel shows FOG/LOW VIS weather warning

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Navigation view UI not visible - bottom ETA arrival bar missing and alternate route and fuel cost and HOS status missing
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: A scale wrapper div around RouteComparisonPanel created a new containing block that broke its absolute positioning, preventing the route comparison from showing. This meant isDriving was never set to true, hiding the arrival bar, fuel cost, and HOS panels.
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: 1) Reverted RouteComparisonPanel wrapper from <div style={scale}> back to <> fragment at line 5873. 2) Added safety check at lines 4746-4758: if hudLayout.showRouteComparison is false, auto-start driving instead of waiting for route comparison panel.
bug_fix_verification.test_method: Playwright automation - Guest login -> Navigation -> Search Dallas TX -> Verify Route Comparison appears -> Click Close -> Verify all HUD elements visible
